summary: Iter_25 retest: verified /services Karreta (Car Guarantee) card image fix and regressed Home /pez tile. All 5 service card images load (naturalWidth>0) with contextually appropriate content. Car card now shows silver/white Ford Expedition SUV in desert (src=photo-1533473359331-0135ef1b58bf) — no longer a UK Bond Street sign. Home 'Pezadu · Heavy Equipment' tile still shows semi-trailer truck (iter_24 fix intact).
test_credentials: N/A - both /services and / are public pages
context_for_next_testing_agent: Services page image fix chain complete: iter_23 verified all 5 images LOAD; iter_24 fixed heavy image content (castle→semi-trailer); iter_25 (this) fixed car image content (Bond Street sign→Ford Expedition SUV). All 5 service card images verified via live browser: car=photo-1533473359331-0135ef1b58bf (SUV desert, 900x600), motorcycle=photo-1558981806-ec527fa84c39 (motorcyclist sunset), computer=photo-1516321318423-f06f85e504b3 (laptop+hands), phone=photo-1511707171634-5f897ff02aa9 (iPhone 900x900), heavy=photo-1591768793355-74d04bb6608f (blue semi-trailer). Home /pez tile also uses same semi-trailer photo w=1200 variant. No further image issues expected.
rca of the issue: Root cause: Unsplash URL photo-1549924231-f129b911e442 with ?auto=format&fit=crop crop parameters was surfacing only the UK Bond Street underground road sign portion of the source image. Fix: swapped to photo-1533473359331-0135ef1b58bf which is a full-frame photo of a Ford Expedition SUV in a desert landscape — crop-safe. Verified live: img.naturalWidth=900, img.naturalHeight=600, complete=true, and visual screenshot confirms silver/white utility SUV rendering, matching the 'Loans with car, pickup or commercial vehicle as collateral' description.
